summary: Complete testing of three new features: @mentions in comments, duplicate order warning, and enhanced search. All backend APIs working correctly - 13/13 tests pass. All frontend features verified: @mention autocomplete dropdown, duplicate warning banner, multi-result search popup.

tests.test: GET /api/users/list returns users for authenticated user
Users list does not expose sensitive data (password, session)
Returns exists=true for existing order number
Returns exists=false for non-existent order number
Case-insensitive matching
Handles empty input gracefully
Search finds orders by store_po
Search finds orders by customer_po
Search still works with order_number
@mention creates mention notification for matched user
Comment without @mention saved correctly with empty mentions array
GET comments includes mentions field in response
Notifications endpoint accessible
NewOrderModal opens correctly
Duplicate warning appears on blur when order exists
Warning shows board name and order number
CommentsModal opens correctly
@mention dropdown appears when typing '@'
Dropdown filters users as you type
Clicking user inserts mention into textarea
@mentions highlighted in blue in rendered comments
Search with multiple results shows modal
Modal shows Order, Store PO, Customer PO, Client, Board columns
Clicking result navigates to order's board
Modal closes after navigation

frontend_search_results_modal.navigation: Click row to go to order's board

seed_data_creation: Created test users John Smith and Jane Doe for @mention testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three new features fully tested and working: 1) @mentions with autocomplete dropdown and 'mention' type notifications, 2) Duplicate order warning with yellow banner on blur, 3) Enhanced search including store_po/customer_po with multi-result modal popup. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration21_mentions_search_duplicate.py.
